name: claudepro-directory
description: Searchable web directory of 262+ pre-built Claude AI configurations including MCP servers, custom rules, agents, and automation hooks. Hosted at claudepro.directory. Built with Next.js and TypeScript as a monorepo (Turborepo/pnpm workspace). Not a traditional installable skill — it is a web application/directory.

findings_summary.notes: This is a Next.js web application (monorepo with pnpm workspaces, Turborepo) that serves as a searchable directory of Claude configurations. MIT license. Well-structured with apps/web, packages/, types/. Has a Vercel deployment config (.vercelignore, vercel.json). Not a traditional SKILL.md-based agent skill — it is a discovery/aggregation service. The repository itself does not contain executable skill files; it is a configuration catalog. 24 open issues is relatively high. No hooks, no install scripts, no dangerous patterns in the repo itself. Concern: classified as an agent_skill but is actually a web directory/SaaS application, which may mislead users expecting an installable skill. The content it catalogs may include third-party configurations of varying security quality.
